items.title: Articulated case against the relationship / Belle relocating (Jun 7) — under-prioritized ('not obsessed the way she should be'), recent near-breakup during his depression, anticipated dependence, absent trust vs. his 'no relationship without trust again' line

Belle conversation handoff UPDATE (May 13 → May 15) — read after the May 13 handoff page; covers Wed-through-Fri stretch including the not-sent long draft, the Friday McDonald's + apology move actually sent, Saturday FaceTime prep, and the still-unresolved medical track
Belle Insights summary — cross-pattern synthesis (June 2026 session)

Belle letter SENT Monday May 18 11pm ET - comprehensive session synthesis, Belle's flat acknowledgment response, open decisions awaiting substantive response (San Antonio trip, response timing, work re-engagement, Mom care), reach-again-after-letter pattern caught in real time, structural diagnosis preserved separately for therapy
Belle to send 30-day written notice on Walnut Creek lease (landlord confirmed; rest pro rata)
Buy Alexa speakers for Mom's music
Claimed absence of Belle Insights without searching — phantom-knowledge response
Confirm bowel-regimen plan for mom (constipation recurrence)
Confirm caregiver coverage for mom
Consolidate mom's active care issues into one master list
Decide: share financial/work stress with Belle now or hold

Disney response paragraph (drafted May 18, not used in letter) - both-halves framing connecting Disney comment and 'what a joke' as two instances of the same avoidance pattern; held back from letter as tangent but preserved for use if Belle raises Disney directly

Final condensed letter to Belle (May 18 evening, held overnight for May 19 morning send) - drowning analogy for scared-misread-as-yelling pattern, closeness-as-language for being-made-to-feel-wrong-for-needing pattern, giving-frame as load-bearing center, soft fork with unconditional family/baby commitment; hostile paragraph + disclaimer + bullet list + Disney + swimsuit moment held back

Final-final letter to Belle (May 18 late / May 19 send) - single-pattern rejection-on-reach reframe, two examples (scared voice misread, closeness called weird) as expressions of the one pattern, Disney + life-load + resentment in one beat, implicit fork only at close; structurally most accurate version after weekend-long drafting arc
Follow up on mom's second-opinion / shunt-adjustment discussion

Long draft text to Belle (May 16 evening, unsent) - maximalist version with scared-not-angry framing using 'wanting to live with me' call, the suppression dynamic, honest depression naming, and unconditional won't-abandon-pregnancy commitment; saved per Ender's request before drafting a fresh-perspective alternative
Mom's progression: the window of awareness is finite — plan by last year's rate of change
Nicole — prepare ADA accommodation request before return to work
Prepare explanation for dad and sister re: mom's misinterpretation of dad's help

Real-time arc in one high-load conversation (Jun 7): self-blame ('what's wrong with me') → list of grievances about Belle; both halves held open (grievances may be accurate AND the speed of the flip on a depleted night is notable)

Reproductive legal helpline call notes (May 20) - Texas legal landscape: OB-GYN records not a risk, exposure falls on providers (criminal) and helpers (civil ~$10k) not the pregnant person, Belle has right to travel for care; ~12wk2d gestational using Feb 23 LMP; nearest out-of-state options NM (24wk) and Kansas (21wk); no decision made
Research Inspire device for Mom's sleep apnea
Resolve mom's CPAP mask/headgear fit

Structural diagnosis of Belle relationship dynamic (May 18 evening) - Belle came from people who didn't honor feelings/limits and lacked template for receiving an attuned partner; Ender's boundaries crumbled because Belle's trauma responses to limits (sobbing, suicidal ideation, self-harm) made enforcement feel like endangering her safety; self-reinforcing dynamic that explains the rejection-on-reach pattern and the resulting depletion

Swimsuit picture moment on Ender's birthday - parallel anchor to the brushing video in the closeness pattern; previously-agreed scaled-down ask refused snappily on birthday night while at parents' caring for mom; cost severe enough that Ender couldn't sleep and it affected his entire week; the asymmetry with Belle's birthday a month earlier is direct and quantifiable

SYNTHESIS [UNREVIEWED - AI-authored, Claude Fable 5] - Belle arc May 4 to Jun 7: stable concerns vs depletion-driven verdicts; two-pole blame pattern with the no-villain middle held only when resourced; move question = caretaking question; trust floor needs direction disambiguation
Update structured summary of mom's condition
Why the relationship feels uncomfortable: Belle's negative reactions land as being put in her abusers' category, and it turns into self-blame
(untitled)
(untitled)
(untitled)
Attorney-research: relied on aggregator / firm-marketing sources instead of independent / firm-current verification
Call IRS re: LT26 notice — case ref 2593985414

Ender owns 'What a joke' was cruel and the Mother's Day omission — first explicit self-application of the symmetry-principle to his contributions in the current stretch; 'going forward I will' on Mother's Day is the first concrete behavioral commitment
Family is a step or two behind on the same road — seeing first means grieving first
File missing IRS tax return(s) — LT26 notice
Finish 2024 taxes
Life-admin sweep — gather all open action items
Manage the function, support the feelings — don't try to make the family grieve your way
Multi-part voice captures not auto-detected during inbox processing
Paste FMP data-routing patch into Project Instructions (Investing 2026)
Protect sleep — stabilize routine
Reframe: a trauma response is an alarm firing, not a verdict - and the self-blame conversion is what does the damage
Track weed use honestly (daily log)

Two-stage insight (May 17-18) - reciprocity as condition for continuing, and the wrong-shape-relationship frame; this relationship became a measurement against expectations Ender is failing, the same shape he left his prior marriage to escape
Verify automations and reminders are actually live
